title: emotional-memory: Affective Field Theory for LLM Memory
description: A Python library implementing Affective Field Theory (AFT) — a 5-layer emotional model for LLM memory that integrates valence-arousal affect (Russell 1980), affective momentum (Spinoza), mood fields (Heidegger), appraisal vectors (Scherer CPM), and resonance links with spreading activation (Collins & Loftus 1975) and Hebbian strengthening (Hebb 1949).
